rows.label: tlk47100161_03_msg0001
rows.name:
My best friend is making
his salvager debut,
just like Rex-niichan!

rows.label: tlk47100161_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Of course I'm going too!
I'll be right beside him,
supporting him all the way!

rows.label: tlk47100161_03_msg0003
rows.name:
The village adults approved us.
They said we won't embarrass
ourselves outside anymore!

rows.label: tlk47100161_03_msg0004
rows.name:
All we had left was to board
a trade ship to Avaritia, but—

rows.label: tlk47100161_03_msg0005
rows.name:
But the Divine Beast seems odd,
so the ships are stopped for now.
